prelims.subject: Current Affairs
prelims.important_chapters: Recent Events (2024-2025), National Issues, International Relations, Climate Action, Social Movements, Economic Updates
prelims.important_topics: Budget announcements, Government schemes, Climate summits, Election updates, UN decisions, Trade relations, Infrastructure projects, Tech advancements
prelims.revision_strategy: Daily current affairs tracking. Weekly news summary. Bi-weekly comprehensive revision. Monthly categorization into static + dynamic components.

prelims.subject: Polity
prelims.important_chapters: Constitution, Fundamental Rights, Directive Principles, Parliamentary System, President & Vice-President, Lok Sabha & Rajya Sabha, Cabinet, Supreme Court
prelims.important_topics: Amendment procedures, Bills process, Constitutional bodies, Rights vs Duties, Executive-Legislative relations, Judicial review, Election commission
prelims.revision_strategy: Conceptual foundation first (Constitution structure). MCQ practice on specific articles. Mock tests on scenario-based questions. Regular revision of recent amendments.

prelims.subject: History
prelims.important_chapters: Ancient India, Medieval India, British India, Freedom Struggle, Post-independence, Cultural heritage, Monuments
prelims.important_topics: Mauryan empire, Mughal period, Company rule, Key freedom fighters, Constitution making, Archaeological sites, Dynasties and rulers
prelims.revision_strategy: Chronological study approach. Thematic connections across periods. Timeline creation for each era. Practice timeline-based and fact-based MCQs. Mind maps for complex periods.

prelims.subject: Geography
prelims.important_chapters: Physical Geography (Climate, Landforms), Economic Geography, Human Geography, Indian Geography, Map-based knowledge
prelims.important_topics: Monsoon patterns, Soil types, River systems, Mountain ranges, Agricultural zones, Mineral resources, Population distribution, Earthquake zones
prelims.revision_strategy: Physical maps study. Thematic maps creation. Climate-vegetation relationships. State-wise geography focus. Latitude-longitude practice. Monthly map revision.

prelims.subject: Economics
prelims.important_chapters: Microeconomics basics, Macroeconomics, Indian Economy, Monetary & Fiscal Policy, Inflation & Deflation, Trade
prelims.important_topics: GDP and growth rates, Inflation rates, Interest rates, Budget components, Direct-indirect taxes, FDI, Exports-imports, Stock market basics
prelims.revision_strategy: Concepts with current data. Comparative analysis year-on-year. Budget document familiarity. Economic survey highlights. Real case studies from India.

prelims.subject: Environment & Ecology
prelims.important_chapters: Ecosystems, Biodiversity, Pollution, Conservation, Climate Change, Environmental laws, Protected areas
prelims.important_topics: Renewable energy, Wildlife protection acts, Ramsar wetlands, Biosphere reserves, Deforestation, Environmental impact assessment, Green initiatives
prelims.revision_strategy: Concept mapping. Data about India's biodiversity. Protected area locations. Environmental laws with amendments. Climate science fundamentals. Case studies on conservation.

mains.subject: Polity
mains.important_chapters: Constitution - structure and features, Federalism, Separation of powers, Rights and duties, Amendment procedure, Electoral system, Local governance
mains.important_topics: Constitutional vision, Directive principles vs Fundamental rights, Executive accountability, Parliamentary procedures, E-governance, Cooperative federalism, Constitutional commissions
mains.revision_strategy: Deep study of constitutional provisions with case law. Analysis of major Supreme Court judgments. Comparative constitutionalism. Current constitutional debates. Essay writing on constitutional themes. Answer writing practice on case-based scenarios.

mains.subject: History
mains.important_chapters: Indus Valley Civilization, Vedic period, Mauryan and Gupta empires, Medieval kingdoms, British colonial period, Independence movement, Nation building
mains.important_topics: Historical determinism vs contingency, Historiography changes, Gender in history, Economic history of India, Cultural interactions, Legacy of empires, Freedom struggle phases
mains.revision_strategy: Analytical approach to historiography. Long essays on major periods. Comparison between historical periods. Primary sources analysis. Research paper reading. Critical historical perspective.

mains.subject: Geography
mains.important_chapters: Geomorphology, Climate systems, Human geography, Regional planning, Sustainability, Geographical analysis methods
mains.important_topics: River management, Urban planning, Regional disparities, Migration patterns, Resource management, Disaster management, Infrastructure development, Geopolitical issues
mains.revision_strategy: Geospatial analysis and interpretation. Critical study of development models. Regional case studies. Contemporary geographical problems. Research paper writing on geographical themes.

mains.subject: Environment & Ecology
mains.important_chapters: Ecosystem functioning, Biodiversity management, Environmental degradation, Sustainable development, Climate change mitigation, Conservation strategies
mains.important_topics: Ecological carrying capacity, Biodiversity loss drivers, Climate financing, Green economy, Environmental justice, Transboundary issues, Habitat restoration
mains.revision_strategy: Scientific understanding of ecological systems. Global environmental agreements analysis. Case studies on environmental management. Essay writing on sustainability. Critical appraisal of development vs conservation.

mains.subject: Economics
mains.important_chapters: Economic theory and practices, Development economics, International trade, Fiscal and monetary policies, Inequality and poverty, Sectoral economics
mains.important_topics: Growth vs development, Structural changes, Inclusive growth, Globalization impact, Financial systems, Infrastructure economics, Human capital, Resource allocation
mains.revision_strategy: Theoretical framework understanding. Indian economic data analysis. Econometric concepts. Policy evaluation and critique. Research papers on economic issues. Essay writing on economic development.

mains.subject: Public Administration
mains.important_chapters: Theories of public administration, Organization theory, Human resource management, Ethics and accountability, Indian administrative system, Service delivery
mains.important_topics: Bureaucratic behavior, State capacity, Administrative reforms, E-governance, Grievance redressal, Personnel management, Policy implementation, Good governance
mains.revision_strategy: Conceptual clarity in administrative theories. Indian bureaucracy analysis. Case studies in public policy. Ethics-based scenarios. Implementation challenges analysis. Contemporary administrative reforms study.
